positive: A minimalist, highly contrasting illustration of a celestial mountain landscape. The scene features stylized, overlapping mountain silhouettes in deep indigo and charcoal gray, with a striking, geometric crescent moon and scattered constellations rendered in vibrant gold foil texture. The foreground includes abstract, stylized groupings of flora and fauna silhouettes—like deer, foxes, and stylized trees—integrated naturally into the peaks. The composition is centralized, utilizing negative space effectively to create a modern, elegant, and mystical aesthetic. Style: Japanese Ukiyo-e meets modern geometric art. Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast chiaroscuro, making the gold elements pop against the dark, matte background. Print-friendly details: Vectors-art quality, crisp edges, suitable for textile repeat or single print on apparel.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, gradients, photorealistic, 3d render
